mapper.sql: select showcase_id, title, description, media_type, media_url, thumbnail_url, category, tags, pet_type, view_count, like_count, share_count, favorite_count, source_task_id, source_user_id, is_featured, is_official, status, sort_order, create_time, update_time from virtual_pet_showcase
mapper.select: where is_featured = 1 and status = 1 order by sort_order, create_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into virtual_pet_showcase (title, description, media_type, media_url, thumbnail_url, category, tags, pet_type, source_task_id, source_user_id, is_featured, is_official, status, sort_order, create_time) values (#{title}, #{description}, #{mediaType}, #{mediaUrl}, #{thumbnailUrl}, #{category}, #{tags}, #{petType}, #{sourceTaskId}, #{sourceUserId}, #{isFeatured}, #{isOfficial}, #{status}, #{sortOrder}, sysdate())
mapper.update: update virtual_pet_showcase set view_count = view_count + 1 where showcase_id = #{showcaseId}
update virtual_pet_showcase set like_count = like_count + 1 where showcase_id = #{showcaseId}
update virtual_pet_showcase set share_count = share_count + 1 where showcase_id = #{showcaseId}
update virtual_pet_showcase set favorite_count = favorite_count + 1 where showcase_id = #{showcaseId}
update virtual_pet_showcase set favorite_count = favorite_count - 1 where showcase_id = #{showcaseId} and favorite_count > 0
